label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Initially, they each have presents of different colors. Let me jot down the starting points first. Starting presents: - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: blue - Dave: black ball - Eve: red Now, they swap gifts in a series of steps. Let me go through each swap one by one and track who has what after each swap. Maybe making a table or list would help. Let me try to keep track step by step. First swap: Dave and Claire swap their gifts. Before this swap: - Dave has black - Claire has blue After swapping: - Dave now has blue - Claire now has black Second swap: Bob and Alice
